meta.title: About WEI LAN | Recycling Equipment Manufacturer and Smart Sorting Systems
meta.description: Learn about WEI LAN, a National High-Tech Enterprise founded in 2019 with RMB 50 million registered capital, smart recycling equipment R&D, patents, certifications, and project support.

pageTitle: Smart waste sorting and recycling equipment manufacturer
bodyHtml:
About WEI LAN

Smart waste sorting and recycling equipment manufacturer

Founded in 2019 with RMB 50 million registered capital, Ningbo Wei Lan Environmental Protection Technology Co., Ltd. is a National High-Tech Enterprise focused on environmental technology R&D, intelligent equipment manufacturing, IoT systems, and digital operation platforms for waste sorting and resource recovery.

Review Capabilities View Factory Records

Company Profile

Environmental technology manufacturer for intelligent recycling equipment and resource recovery systems

WEI LAN helps project owners, recycling operators, and municipal partners evaluate intelligent equipment, integrated systems, and digital management platforms before quotation, layout planning, and delivery discussion.

01

Environmental technology foundation

WEI LAN is an environmental technology company focused on intelligent equipment R&D, manufacturing, system integration, IoT support, and operation management platform development for waste sorting and resource recovery industries.

02

Smart city and resource recovery focus

Guided by the vision of being rooted in R&D, building platforms, and serving environmental protection and smart cities, the company combines market demand research with intelligent and digital technologies to support higher-value recycling projects.

2019 Founded in Ningbo
RMB 50M RMB 50 million registered capital
64 Independent IP assets
3 ISO management systems

Manufacturing System

Manufacturing is controlled from R&D validation to equipment delivery

The About page is structured around the proof project teams usually need: intelligent equipment manufacturing, technology development, digital platform capability, certifications, and quality control.

01

Equipment manufacturing base

Equipment manufacturing, module assembly, process integration, and project delivery support cover AI optical sorting systems, construction waste recycling lines, and supporting intelligent control systems.

02

R&D and patents

R&D work supports machine vision, optical sorting, modular line configuration, control systems, and digital operation tools backed by 64 independent IP assets, including 37 software copyrights and 27 patents.

03

Certified management systems

ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and ISO 45001 certifications plus National High-Tech Enterprise recognition give project teams a more concrete basis for supplier qualification and internal approval.

04

Production and delivery control

Product development is driven by market and customer application needs, with production checks, equipment assembly review, documentation preparation, and commissioning support used to reduce uncertainty before shipment and startup.

Certifications & Qualifications

Enterprise qualifications that support supplier review and engineering confidence

These proof points support supplier review, internal qualification, and project confidence before detailed engineering documentation is prepared.

01

ISO 9001:2015

Quality management system for equipment manufacturing, production control, supplier coordination, and project delivery consistency.

02

ISO 14001:2015

Environmental management system aligned with WEI LAN's resource recovery, waste reduction, and recycling equipment business.

03

ISO 45001:2018

Occupational health and safety management support for manufacturing, commissioning, and long-running equipment service work.

04

Ningbo SRDI SME

Public qualification as 宁波市专精特新中小企业, a Ningbo specialized, refined, distinctive, and innovative SME recognition, supports supplier due diligence for reviewing WEI LAN's technology and delivery capability.

05

National High-Tech Enterprise

National recognition for technology development in intelligent waste sorting, IoT systems, digital operation platforms, and resource recovery equipment.

06

Independent IP portfolio

WEI LAN owns 64 independent intellectual property assets: 37 software copyrights and 27 patents, including 19 utility model patents, 3 design patents, and 5 invention patents.

Carbon Data

Digital operation data extends recycling performance into carbon and recovery reporting

Carbon trading and carbon asset work is presented separately from company credentials because it is an operating data capability used during recycling project evaluation.

06

Carbon and recovery data platform

Digital operation platforms can collect throughput, sorting categories, recovery volume, cumulative weight, and carbon indicators to support carbon accounting discussions and carbon asset evaluation for recycling projects.

  • Throughput records Track treated material volume, recovered output, and cumulative project weight.
  • Sorting category data Separate recyclable streams by material type for project reporting and operation review.
  • Carbon indicator support Prepare operating data that can support carbon accounting discussion and carbon asset assessment.

Factory Records

Factory records connect equipment assembly, product details, and project verification

Existing site images are used as current proof placeholders. Certificate scans, factory photos, equipment assembly photos, and exhibition images can be added here as they are prepared.

System environment records

Smart sorting center concepts show equipment, process flow, and digital control environment for resource recovery operations.

Assembly and module records

Integrated crushing, screening, magnetic separation, air separation, baling, and digital management modules support C&D waste projects.

Product detail records

Modular optical sorting configurations for PET, HDPE, PP, and mixed recyclable plastics.

Visit and exhibition records

Visit, exhibition, and reference materials can help overseas project teams verify supplier capability before deeper technical review.

News

Company activity that shows ongoing delivery and technology development

News items help overseas project teams understand recent company activity, customer visits, equipment delivery work, and verification signals before a deeper supplier review.

Company update / Exhibition

Market and visit activity

WEI LAN can share exhibition participation, customer visit materials, and supplier review evidence when project teams need more context before technical review.

Project note / Delivery

Delivery and commissioning activity

Delivery notes can summarize manufacturing preparation, modular shipment, installation coordination, and commissioning support for overseas recycling projects.

Company proof / Technology

Technology and qualification updates

Technology, patent, certification, and digital operation updates support supplier qualification and internal approval for equipment procurement.

Document Support

Qualification, reference, and engineering files for project review

Share your project country, waste type, capacity target, and documentation requirements. WEI LAN can provide suitable credential details, product information, and engineering proposal direction for project evaluation.

Request Engineering Proposal Explore Product Lines
